about.title: About EventEditorPro
about.content:
EventEditorPro

EventEditorPro is an open-source event flow editor for The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild. Pro version from YuQing66 and his team on GameBanana. Thanks to original author leoetlino.

Version: {version}
Revision: {revision}

note.sub_flow: Note: this flowchart ({name}) will be used if no flowchart is explicitly specified.
